footnotes.footnote: 1. Represents restricted stock units granted under the Tractor Supply Company 2009 Stock Incentive Plan. Each restricted stock unit represents a contingent right to receive one share of Tractor Supply Company common stock. The restricted stock units vest on the third anniversary of the date of grant.

ownerSignature.signatureName: Steve K. Barbarick by: /s/ Benjamin F. Parrish, as Attorney-in-fact
